message:
chore(beads): Enhance bd-19y9 EPIC with comprehensive specifications

Updated beads in the ACFS Installer Reliability EPIC:
- bd-19y9.1.4: Added complete prompt templates for all error types
- bd-19y9.1.5: Added full notification script implementation
- bd-19y9.2.4: Added YAML validation and detailed audit process
- bd-19y9.2.5: Added test cases for all event types (installer-removed, installer-added, idempotency)
- bd-19y9.3.5: Added complete upgrade and clean reinstall implementations

These enhancements ensure each bead has sufficient detail for
implementation without ambiguity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
